scripts.ffmpeg:test: yarn clean:ff && ffmpeg -hide_banner -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -b:v 1M -maxrate 1M -bufsize 2M -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/output.mp4 && ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration:stream=codec_name -of json ../ffout/output.mp4
scripts.mp4:transcode: yarn clean:ff && ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -b:v 4M -maxrate 4M -bufsize 8M -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/output.mp4
scripts.media:publish:mp4: shx mkdir -p public/media && shx cp ../ffout/output.mp4 public/media/output.mp4 && (open http://localhost:5173/lab || echo "Open http://localhost:5173/lab to inspect output.mp4")
scripts.tour:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/tour && shx mkdir -p public/media/tour && shx cp ../ffout/tour/*.mp4 public/media/tour/ && (open http://localhost:5173/lab || echo "Open http://localhost:5173/lab")
scripts.tour:all: yarn tour:probe && yarn tour:trim && yarn tour:transcode && yarn tour:verify
scripts.rate:crf23: yarn rate:clean && ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -c:v libx264 -crf 23 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/rate/crf23.mp4
scripts.rate:vbr2pass2m: ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -c:v libx264 -b:v 2M -maxrate 2M -bufsize 4M -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -pass 1 -passlogfile ../ffout/rate/ffpass -an -f mp4 ../ffout/rate/_tmp.mp4 && ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -c:v libx264 -b:v 2M -maxrate 2M -bufsize 4M -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -pass 2 -passlogfile ../ffout/rate/ffpass -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/rate/vbr_2pass_2M.mp4 && shx rm -f ../ffout/rate/_tmp.mp4 ../ffout/rate/ffpass*
scripts.rate:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/{crf,cbr,vbr} && shx mkdir -p public/media/{crf,cbr,vbr} && shx cp ../ffout/rate/crf23.mp4 public/media/crf/ && shx cp ../ffout/rate/cbr_2M.mp4 public/media/cbr/ && shx cp ../ffout/rate/vbr_2pass_2M.mp4 public/media/vbr/
scripts.rate:all: yarn rate:crf23 && yarn rate:cbr2m && yarn rate:vbr2pass2m && yarn rate:verify
scripts.rate:probe: shx ls -lh ../ffout/rate && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries format=bit_rate -of json ../ffout/rate/crf23.mp4 && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries format=bit_rate -of json ../ffout/rate/cbr_2M.mp4 && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries format=bit_rate -of json ../ffout/rate/vbr_2pass_2M.mp4
scripts.rate:publish:win: shx rm -rf public/media/crf public/media/cbr public/media/vbr && shx mkdir -p public/media/crf && shx mkdir -p public/media/cbr && shx mkdir -p public/media/vbr && shx cp ../ffout/rate/crf23.mp4 public/media/crf/ && shx cp ../ffout/rate/cbr_2M.mp4 public/media/cbr/ && shx cp ../ffout/rate/vbr_2pass_2M.mp4 public/media/vbr/
scripts.rate:probe:all: yarn probe:sample && yarn probe:output && yarn rate:probe
scripts.ladder:p240: ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -vf scale=-2:426  -c:v libx264 -crf 23 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/ladder/p240.mp4
scripts.ladder:p360: ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -vf scale=-2:640  -c:v libx264 -crf 23 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/ladder/p360.mp4
scripts.ladder:p480: ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -vf scale=-2:854  -c:v libx264 -crf 23 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/ladder/p480.mp4
scripts.ladder:p720: ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -vf scale=-2:1280 -c:v libx264 -crf 23 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/ladder/p720.mp4
scripts.ladder:p1080: ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -vf scale=-2:1920 -c:v libx264 -crf 23 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/ladder/p1080.mp4
scripts.ladder:verify: ls -lh ../ffout/ladder/*.mp4 && bash -lc 'for f in ../ffout/ladder/*.mp4; do echo "==> $f"; ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 -show_entries stream=width,height -of csv=p=0 "$f"; done'
scripts.ladder:all: yarn ladder:clean && yarn ladder:p240 && yarn ladder:p360 && yarn ladder:p480 && yarn ladder:p720 && yarn ladder:p1080 && yarn ladder:verify
scripts.ladder:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/ladder && shx mkdir -p public/media/ladder && shx cp ../ffout/ladder/*.mp4 public/media/ladder/
scripts.presets:verify: ls -lh ../ffout/presets/*.mp4 && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries format=bit_rate -of json ../ffout/presets/ultrafast.mp4 && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries format=bit_rate -of json ../ffout/presets/slow.mp4
scripts.presets:all: yarn presets:clean && yarn presets:ultrafast && yarn presets:slow && yarn presets:verify
scripts.presets:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/presets && shx mkdir -p public/media/presets && shx cp ../ffout/presets/*.mp4 public/media/presets/
scripts.codecs:hevc5s: ffmpeg -hide_banner -y -ss 0 -t 5 -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -c:v libx265 -crf 28 -preset medium -g 60 -x265-params keyint=60:min-keyint=60:scenecut=0 -tag:v hvc1 -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/codecs/hevc_5s.mp4
scripts.codecs:verify: ls -lh ../ffout/codecs/*.mp4 && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries format=duration -of json ../ffout/codecs/hevc_5s.mp4 && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries stream=codec_name -of json ../ffout/codecs/hevc_5s.mp4 && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries stream=codec_name -of json ../ffout/codecs/av1_5s.mp4
scripts.codecs:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/codecs && shx mkdir -p public/media/codecs && shx cp ../ffout/codecs/*.mp4 public/media/codecs/
scripts.codecs:all: yarn codecs:clean && yarn codecs:hevc5s && yarn codecs:av15s && yarn codecs:verify
scripts.codecs:probe: yarn codecs:probe:duration && yarn codecs:probe:hevc && yarn codecs:probe:av1
scripts.audio:mp4: ffmpeg -hide_banner -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -an -vn -f lavfi -i anullsrc=channel_layout=stereo:sample_rate=48000 -shortest ../ffout/audio/blank.mp4 && ffmpeg -hide_banner -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -vn -c:a aac -b:a 128k -map a ../ffout/audio/sample_aac128.mp4
scripts.audio:verify: ls -lh ../ffout/audio/* && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries stream=codec_name,channels,bit_rate -of json ../ffout/audio/sample_aac128.m4a && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries stream=codec_name,channels,bit_rate -of json ../ffout/audio/sample_aac128.mp4
scripts.audio:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/audio && shx mkdir -p public/media/audio && shx cp ../ffout/audio/*.m4a public/media/audio/ && shx cp ../ffout/audio/*.mp4 public/media/audio/
scripts.audio:all: yarn audio:clean && yarn audio:m4a && yarn audio:mp4 && yarn audio:verify
scripts.hls:sp:verify: shx ls -l ../ffout/hls_sp && shx ls -l ../ffout/hls_sp/audio/*.m4s | wc -l && shx ls -l ../ffout/hls_sp/video/*.m4s | wc -l && shx head -n 20 ../ffout/hls_sp/master.m3u8
scripts.hls:sp:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/hls_sp && shx mkdir -p public/media/hls_sp && shx cp -r ../ffout/hls_sp/* public/media/hls_sp/
scripts.dash:sp:verify: shx ls -l ../ffout/dash_sp && shx ls -l ../ffout/dash_sp/audio/*.m4s | wc -l && shx ls -l ../ffout/dash_sp/video/*.m4s | wc -l && shx head -n 40 ../ffout/dash_sp/stream.mpd
scripts.dash:sp:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/dash_sp && shx mkdir -p public/media/dash_sp && shx cp -r ../ffout/dash_sp/* public/media/dash_sp/
scripts.thumbs:vtt:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/thumbs_vtt && shx mkdir -p public/media/thumbs_vtt && shx cp ../ffout/thumbs_vtt/* public/media/thumbs_vtt/
scripts.captions:sample:
node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('../ffout/captions/en.vtt','WEBVTT

00:00:00.000 --> 00:00:02.000
Hello world.

00:00:02.000 --> 00:00:05.000
This is a caption demo.
')"
scripts.captions:from-srt: shx test -f public/assets/captions/en.srt && ffmpeg -hide_banner -y -i public/assets/captions/en.srt ../ffout/captions/en.vtt || echo 'Place SRT at public/assets/captions/en.srt'
scripts.captions:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/captions && shx mkdir -p public/media/captions && shx cp ../ffout/captions/*.vtt public/media/captions/
scripts.captions:burnin: shx mkdir -p ../ffout/captions && shx test -f public/assets/captions/en.srt && ffmpeg -hide_banner -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -vf "subtitles=public/assets/captions/en.srt" -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/captions/out_burnin.mp4 || echo 'Place SRT at public/assets/captions/en.srt'
scripts.captions:embed: shx mkdir -p ../ffout/captions && shx test -f public/assets/captions/en.srt && ffmpeg -hide_banner -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -i public/assets/captions/en.srt -c:v copy -c:a copy -c:s mov_text -metadata:s:s:0 language=en ../ffout/captions/out_tx3g.mp4 || echo 'Place SRT at public/assets/captions/en.srt'
scripts.hls:subs:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/hls_subs && shx mkdir -p public/media/hls_subs && shx cp -r ../ffout/hls_subs/* public/media/hls_subs/
scripts.dash:subs:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/dash_subs && shx mkdir -p public/media/dash_subs && shx cp -r ../ffout/dash_subs/* public/media/dash_subs/
scripts.hls:cmaf: shx rm -rf ../ffout/hls && shx mkdir -p ../ffout/hls && ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -map 0:v -map 0:a -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -b:v 4M -maxrate 4M -bufsize 8M -c:a aac -b:a 128k -f hls -hls_time 2 -hls_segment_type fmp4 -hls_flags independent_segments -master_pl_name master.m3u8 -hls_fmp4_init_filename init.mp4 -hls_segment_filename "../ffout/hls/seg_%03d.m4s" ../ffout/hls/stream.m3u8
scripts.hls:cmaf:win: shx rm -rf ../ffout/hls && shx mkdir -p ../ffout/hls && ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -map 0:v -map 0:a -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -b:v 4M -maxrate 4M -bufsize 8M -c:a aac -b:a 128k -f hls -hls_time 2 -hls_segment_type fmp4 -hls_flags independent_segments -master_pl_name master.m3u8 -hls_fmp4_init_filename init.mp4 -hls_segment_filename "../ffout/hls/seg_%%03d.m4s" ../ffout/hls/stream.m3u8
scripts.hls:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/hls && shx mkdir -p public/media && shx cp -r ../ffout/hls public/media/hls
scripts.dash:cmaf: shx rm -rf ../ffout/dash && shx mkdir -p ../ffout/dash && ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -map 0:v -map 0:a -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -b:v 4000k -maxrate 4000k -bufsize 8000k -c:a aac -b:a 128k -f dash -use_template 1 -use_timeline 0 -init_seg_name init-\$RepresentationID\$.mp4 -media_seg_name chunk-\$RepresentationID\$-\$Number%05d\$.m4s -seg_duration 2 -adaptation_sets "id=0,streams=v id=1,streams=a" ../ffout/dash/stream.mpd
scripts.dash:cmaf:win: shx rm -rf ../ffout/dash && shx mkdir -p ../ffout/dash && ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -map 0:v -map 0:a -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -b:v 4000k -maxrate 4000k -bufsize 8000k -c:a aac -b:a 128k -f dash -use_template 1 -use_timeline 0 -init_seg_name init-$RepresentationID$.mp4 -media_seg_name chunk-$RepresentationID$-$Number%%05d$.m4s -seg_duration 2 -adaptation_sets "id=0,streams=v id=1,streams=a" ../ffout/dash/stream.mpd
scripts.dash:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/dash && shx mkdir -p public/media && shx cp -r ../ffout/dash public/media/dash
scripts.s3:mk: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const b=process.env.S3_BUCKET;const r=process.env.AWS_REGION||'us-east-1';if(!b)throw new Error('S3_BUCKET env required');const create = r==='us-east-1' ? `aws s3api create-bucket --bucket ${b}` : `aws s3api create-bucket --bucket ${b} --create-bucket-configuration LocationConstraint=${r}`;execSync(create,{stdio:'inherit'});execSync(`aws s3api put-bucket-ownership-controls --bucket ${b} --ownership-controls '{\"Rules\":[{\"ObjectOwnership\":\"BucketOwnerEnforced\"}]}'`,{stdio:'inherit'});execSync(`aws s3api put-public-access-block --bucket ${b} --public-access-block-configuration BlockPublicAcls=false,IgnorePublicAcls=false,BlockPublicPolicy=false,RestrictPublicBuckets=false`,{stdio:'inherit'});console.log('Bucket created:',b,'region:',r);"
scripts.s3:policy: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const b=process.env.S3_BUCKET;if(!b)throw new Error('S3_BUCKET env required');const p={Version:'2012-10-17',Statement:[{Sid:'PublicReadGetObject',Effect:'Allow',Principal:'*',Action:['s3:GetObject'],Resource:[`arn:aws:s3:::${b}/*`]}]};fs.writeFileSync('../ffout_s3_policy.json',JSON.stringify(p,null,2));console.log('Policy -> ../ffout_s3_policy.json');" && aws s3api put-bucket-policy --bucket $S3_BUCKET --policy file://../ffout_s3_policy.json
scripts.s3:sync: aws s3 sync public/ s3://$S3_BUCKET/ --delete --cache-control max-age=60
scripts.cf:config: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const r=process.env.AWS_REGION||'us-east-1';const b=process.env.S3_BUCKET; if(!b) throw new Error('S3_BUCKET env required'); const originDomain=(r==='us-east-1')?`${b}.s3-website-us-east-1.amazonaws.com`:`${b}.s3-website-${r}.amazonaws.com`; const caller=String(Date.now()); const ManagedCachingOptimized='658327ea-f89d-4fab-a63d-7e88639e58f6'; const cfg={CallerReference:caller,Comment:`bootcamp default distro ${caller}`,Enabled:true,Origins:{Quantity:1,Items:[{Id:'s3-website-origin',DomainName:originDomain,CustomOriginConfig:{HTTPPort:80,HTTPSPort:443,OriginProtocolPolicy:'http-only',OriginSSLProtocols:{Quantity:3,Items:['TLSv1','TLSv1.1','TLSv1.2']}}}]},DefaultCacheBehavior:{TargetOriginId:'s3-website-origin',ViewerProtocolPolicy:'redirect-to-https',AllowedMethods:{Quantity:2,Items:['GET','HEAD']},Compress:true,CachePolicyId:ManagedCachingOptimized},Aliases:{Quantity:0},PriceClass:'PriceClass_100',HttpVersion:'http2',IsIPV6Enabled:true,DefaultRootObject:'index.html',CustomErrorResponses:{Quantity:1,Items:[{ErrorCode:404,ResponseCode:404,ResponsePagePath:'/error.html'}]}}; fs.mkdirSync('../ffout',{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync('../ffout_cf_dist.json',JSON.stringify({DistributionConfig:cfg},null,2)); console.log('Wrote ../ffout_cf_dist.json with origin:',originDomain);"
scripts.cf:mk: aws cloudfront create-distribution --distribution-config file://../ffout_cf_dist.json > ../ffout_cf_create.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('../ffout_cf_create.json','utf8'));const id=j.Distribution.Id;const dom=j.Distribution.DomainName;fs.writeFileSync('../ffout_cf_id.txt',id);fs.writeFileSync('../ffout_cf_domain.txt',dom);console.log('ID',id,'DOMAIN',dom);"
scripts.cf:cache:test: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const dom=fs.readFileSync('../ffout_cf_domain.txt','utf8').trim();process.stdout.write('https://'+dom+'/')" | xargs -I {} bash -lc "echo BASE={} && curl -sI {}index.html | grep -i CF-Cache-Status || true && curl -sI {}index.html | grep -i CF-Cache-Status || true"
scripts.lint:hls:tags: shx grep -n "^#EXTM3U" public/media/hls_sp/master.m3u8 && shx grep -n "#EXT-X-VERSION" public/media/hls_sp/master.m3u8
scripts.lint:dash:tags: shx grep -n "<AdaptationSet" public/media/dash_sp/stream.mpd && shx grep -n "<Representation" public/media/dash_sp/stream.mpd
scripts.canary:encode480: ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -vf scale=-2:480 -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -b:v 900k -maxrate 900k -bufsize 1800k -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/canary/480.mp4
scripts.canary:hls: ffmpeg -y -i ../ffout/canary/480.mp4 -map 0:v -map 0:a -c copy -f hls -hls_time 2 -hls_segment_type fmp4 -hls_flags independent_segments -master_pl_name master.m3u8 -hls_fmp4_init_filename init.mp4 -hls_segment_filename "../ffout/canary/hls/seg_%03d.m4s" ../ffout/canary/hls/stream.m3u8 && shx cp -r ../ffout/canary/hls public/media/canary/hls
scripts.canary:all: yarn canary:clean && yarn canary:encode480 && yarn canary:hls && yarn canary:dash
